x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Consolidates HDC's dispersed financing record (developments reconciled from HPD's adjacent LIHTC datasets, financing programs/term sheets, and bond issues disclosed on federal MSRB EMMA) under one BBL-keyed model, and adds apply_for_financing — the net-new write workflow locked today inside HDC's Developer Intake Portal. HDC owns no NYC Open Data and no API.

server.name: io.nyc.hdc
server.title: NYC Housing Development Corporation (HDC)
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Housing Development Corporation — the City's affordable-housing bond financier. Surfaces HDC-financed developments (reconciled from HPD's LIHTC 4% award datasets, since HDC publishes none of its own), HDC financing programs and their term sheets (New Construction, ELLA, Mix and Match, Preservation, PACT Preservation, Sustainable Development Bonds), and HDC bond issues (Housing Revenue Bonds / SDBs, disclosed on federal MSRB EMMA), plus the net-new ability to apply for HDC bond + subsidy financing — a Developer Intake Form that today lives only in HDC's Developer Intake Portal with no API.
server.instructions: Use find_developments / get_development to locate HDC-financed affordable-housing developments by borough, program, construction type, or BBL (data reconciled from HPD's adjacent LIHTC datasets — there is no HDC-owned dataset). find_financing_programs / get_financing_program return HDC's term-sheet programs and their loan terms. find_bond_issues / get_bond_issue cover HDC's bond series (note: primary investor disclosure is on the federal MSRB EMMA platform, not a City system). list_my_financing_applications reads the authenticated developer's own intake submissions. apply_for_financing (net-new) submits a Developer Intake Form requesting HDC financing; it requires an authenticated developer and mutates state — confirm the program, development (address/BBL, units, affordability), and requested amount with the user before submitting, and note that submission does NOT indicate acceptance of a project proposal. HDC serves developers and bond investors, not the public — there is no citizen transaction here.

tools.name: find_developments
tools.title: Find Developments
tools.description: Search HDC-financed affordable-housing developments by borough, program, construction type, application year, BBL, or free text. Data reconciled from HPD's LIHTC 4% award datasets — HDC publishes no dataset of its own.

tools.name: get_development
tools.title: Get Development
tools.description: Fetch a single HDC-financed development (program, units, affordability, borrower, geography) by BBL.

tools.name: find_financing_programs
tools.title: Find Financing Programs
tools.description: List HDC financing programs (New Construction, ELLA, Mix and Match, Preservation, PACT Preservation, Sustainable Development Bonds) with their published term sheets and loan terms.

tools.name: get_financing_program
tools.title: Get Financing Program
tools.description: Fetch an HDC financing program and its term-sheet terms (LTV/LTC caps, DSCR, affordability) by program id.

tools.name: find_bond_issues
tools.title: Find Bond Issues
tools.description: Search HDC bond issues (Housing Revenue Bonds, Sustainable Development Bonds) by type, sustainability flag, or date. Note: primary investor disclosure lives on the federal MSRB EMMA platform, not a City system; the only City open-data trace is OMB 'Debt Issuance by Issuer'.

tools.name: get_bond_issue
tools.title: Get Bond Issue
tools.description: Fetch an HDC bond series (par amounts, ratings, Official Statement / EMMA disclosure links) by series id.

tools.name: list_my_financing_applications
tools.title: List My Financing Applications
tools.description: List the authenticated developer's own HDC financing applications and their status — today visible only inside HDC's Developer Intake Portal.

tools.name: get_financing_status
tools.title: Get Financing Status
tools.description: Get the review status of a submitted HDC financing application (Developer Intake Form) by application id.

tools.name: apply_for_financing
tools.title: Apply for HDC Financing
tools.description: Submit a Developer Intake Form requesting HDC bond + subsidy financing under a program (New Construction, ELLA, Mix and Match, Preservation, PACT). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in HDC's Developer Intake Portal. Requires an authenticated developer. Mutates state — confirm the program, development (address/BBL, units, affordability), and requested amount first; note that submission does NOT indicate acceptance of a project proposal. This is a B2G/developer transaction; HDC has no citizen write.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.

prompts.name: explore_hdc
prompts.description: Search and read NYC Housing Development Corp (HDC) records — Developments, Programs, Bonds, Financing.

prompts.name: apply_for_hdc
prompts.description: FinancingApplication — a developer submits a Developer Intake Form requesting HDC bond + subsidy financing under a program (New Construction/ELLA/Mix and Match/Preservation/PACT) for a development. A B2G/developer write;

prompts.name: check_hdc_status
prompts.description: Check the status of a NYC Housing Development Corp (HDC) application, case, or request.

resources.name: NYC Housing Development Corp (HDC) — profile
resources.description: NYC Housing Development Corp (HDC): 9 operations, 9 tools, verb “originate”.

resources.name: Developments record (templated)
resources.description: A single NYC Housing Development Corp (HDC) Developments record by id.
